feature_name: AnDigi v1.1 — Motorbike claims fast-track (next draft)
summary: Extends AI triage: motorbike physical-damage claims get a higher fast-track ceiling and a streamlined evidence flow.

requirements.title: Raised fast-track ceiling
requirements.statement: Motorbike physical-damage claims up to 20,000,000 VND that pass AI triage are auto-approved instantly without human review.
acceptance_criteria: Given a motorbike claim of 20,000,000 VND or less with a passing triage score, when triage completes, then the claim is approved with no human in the path.

requirements.title: Streamlined evidence
requirements.statement: Per regulation on simplified motor claims, customers submit only two photos and the system must re-verify e-KYC for claims above 10,000,000 VND.
acceptance_criteria: Given a claim above 10,000,000 VND, when FNOL is submitted, then e-KYC re-verification is triggered before triage.
